CustomField.formula: IF( DX_C_AcceptNextSuggestion6__c=true,"f", IF( DX_C_AcceptSuggestion5__c=true,"e", IF( OR(DX_C_AcceptAppointment4__c=true, DX_C_RequestSuggestion4__c= true),"d", IF( OR(DX_C_SalesStaffCall3__c=true,DX_C_SpecificTask3__c=true, DX_M_AcceptAppointment3__c =true && OR(DX_O_ListenBIM3__c =true, DX_O_WebColumnBrowse3__c =true)), "c", IF( DX_M_ListenIntroduction2__c =true && DX_O_AcceptAppointment2__c =true, "b", IF( OR(DX_C_AcceptAppointment1__c=true, DX_C_DocumentRequest1__c=true, DX_C_Inquiry1__c=true, DX_C_Webinar1__c=true, DX_C_BoothArrive1__c=true), "a", "z" ))))))
CustomField.label: レベル_DX
